```{ojs}
//| echo: false
{
  const z = d3.range(-5, 5, 0.05);

  const hinge = (z, y) => Math.max(0, -y * z);

  const dataPos = z.map(d => ({ z: d, val: hinge(d, 1) }));
  const dataNeg = z.map(d => ({ z: d, val: hinge(d, -1) }));

  const plot = Plot.plot({
    width: 500,
    height: 300,
    x: { label: "z" },
    y: { label: "max(0, -y z)" },
    marks: [
      Plot.line(dataPos, { x: "z", y: "val", stroke: "steelblue" }),
      Plot.line(dataNeg, { x: "z", y: "val", stroke: "tomato" }),
      Plot.ruleX([0], { strokeDasharray: "4,4" }),
      Plot.ruleY([0])
    ]
  });

  const wrapper = document.createElement("div");
  wrapper.style.display = "flex";
  wrapper.style.justifyContent = "center";
  wrapper.style.position = "relative";
  wrapper.style.margin = "1rem 0";

  const legend = document.createElement("div");
  legend.innerHTML = `
    <div style="display:flex; align-items:center; gap:6px;">
      <div style="width:14px; height:3px; background:steelblue;"></div>
      <span>y = 1</span>
    </div>
    <div style="display:flex; align-items:center; gap:6px;">
      <div style="width:14px; height:3px; background:tomato;"></div>
      <span>y = -1</span>
    </div>
  `;

  legend.style.cssText = `
    position: absolute;
    top: 12px;
    right: 12px;
    background: white;
    border: 1px solid black;
    border-radius: 4px;
    padding: 6px 8px;
    font-size: 12px;
  `;

  wrapper.appendChild(plot);
  wrapper.appendChild(legend);

  return wrapper;
}
```
